title: M1SS 2 Pcs Extra Large Christmas Santa Sack Red Stockings Gift Bags or Sacks With Motif and Drawstring Tie Fleece Present Filer Storage Bags Gift Wrap Xmas Decorations Home Goody Bag (XL -95cm x 60cm)
features: DURABLE MATERIAL: Pack of 2pcs, Jumbo Christmas Santa bags are made of non-woven fabric, non-toxic and no fading, with soft hand feeling, and feature classic Santa Design on it.

DRAWSTRING TIE: Drawstring bags, no need to wrap presents, convenient to carry and use, large size, durable and practical, save your time and efforts, great for gift giving, party favors and place settings, giving you a quick and easy way to dress up your holiday party.

WIDE APPLICATION: Large Santa bag is a good holiday party accessory, great for you to place Christmas presents, decorating Christmas party, can be a fun addition to your casual family Christmas dinner with the family, make your party more attractive and fun.

PERFECT SIZE: Christmas Santa sack is 60cm x 95cm Approx., enough space for your basic needs in a large party, children will love this quality red Santa sack on Christmas Evenings, to hope them could receive many gifts in it.

AMAZING CHRISTMAS GIFT ESSENTIAL: This Santa presents bag will enhance a strong festival atmosphere and bring your family happier, it's a cute little way to get a smile during the party, great for Christmas decorations, let your guests get more laughter.
